texto: When we fail, we cut the string. Then God ties it up again, making a knot and thereby bringing us a little closer to Him. Again and again our failures cut the string, and with each additional knot God keeps drawing us closer and closer.
explicacao: Citação de Sharon A. Hersh sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “When we fail, we cut the string. Then God ties it up again, making a knot and thereby bringing us…” articula reflexao, grace, again em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
